message: test: adapt worktree menu helper access

files.patch:
@@ -8,13 +8,19 @@ struct WorktreeMenuTests {
     func worktreeMenuItem_wiresActionAndPayload() {
         let manager = StatusBarMenuManager(appState: AppState())
         let path = URL(fileURLWithPath: "/tmp/worktree", isDirectory: true)
-        let item = manager.makeLocalWorktreeMenuItem(
+        let item = manager.makeLocalWorktreeMenuItem(.init(
             displayPath: "/tmp/worktree",
             branch: "main",
             isCurrent: true,
+            upstream: nil,
+            aheadCount: nil,
+            behindCount: nil,
+            lastCommitDate: nil,
+            lastCommitAuthor: nil,
+            dirtySummary: nil,
             path: path,
             fullName: "owner/repo"
-        )
+        ))
 
         #expect(item.target != nil)
         #expect(item.action != nil)
